title: Morning Hike
description: A simple local trail for fresh air and light movement.

title: Coffee Shop Sketch Date
description: Bring notebooks, pick prompts, and sketch together for an hour.

title: Board Game Night
description: A casual group night built around easy-to-learn games.

title: Museum Slow Walk
description: Pick one exhibit and take your time reading, sketching, and wandering.

title: Picnic at Sunset
description: Pack simple food, choose a scenic spot, and stay through golden hour.

title: Escape Room
description: Work together to solve puzzles under a time limit.

title: Farmers Market Loop
description: Browse stalls, try a snack, and pick one ingredient for dinner.

title: Mini Golf
description: A low-pressure activity with built-in conversation and light competition.

title: Potluck Dinner
description: Everyone brings one dish and shares the story behind it.

title: Library Reading Hour
description: Choose a book, find a quiet table, and read without distractions.

title: Cooking Class
description: Learn a new recipe together with an instructor and shared prep stations.

title: Trivia Night
description: Join a local trivia event and split topics across the group.

title: Photo Walk
description: Pick a neighborhood and capture interesting textures, signs, and light.

title: Kayak Rental
description: Rent kayaks for a short route on calm water.

title: Volunteer Shift
description: Sign up for a short community volunteer session together.
